title: Plot Structure Ethos
summary: Fractal anomaly-hypothesis-test-cost structure for the book: constant curiosity, tightening models, and convergence-driven escalation.

narrative.notes: Canonical plotting doctrine covering anomaly -> hypothesis -> test -> cost -> new anomaly, chapter output minimums, convergence devices, cost discipline, and clarity-chamber rules. Applies book-wide unless superseded by narrower structural doctrine.
